experience.title: Accounts Assistant
bullets: Assisted senior accountants with preparation of financial statements for SME clients.
Processed payroll for 6 client companies on a monthly basis.
Performed bank reconciliations and resolved discrepancies.

experience.title: Finance Officer
bullets: Managed accounts payable and receivable for a business with ₦850M annual turnover.
Prepared monthly management accounts and variance reports for the CFO.
Worked with external auditors during annual audit with no material findings raised.

experience.title: Finance Analyst
bullets: Responsible for budgeting and forecasting across 3 regional business units.
Improved invoice processing time by streamlining approval workflows.
Produces weekly cash flow reports presented to senior management.
